book.rule_description.menu.rule_agree: I agree to the Terms of Service
book.rule_description.menu.rule_confirm: I confirm agreement to the Terms of Service
book.rule_description.menu.rule_page.0: 1. All services under this Discord group and the domain catbud.net (hereinafter referred to as the "services") are managed by <@455305052416901130> (hereinafter referred to as the "administrator"). <@1204408356320575528> is a dummy entity created for backend processes (hereinafter referred to as the "system"), and you cannot claim to be an owner or administrator to others.
book.rule_description.menu.rule_page.1: 2. The administrator reserves the right to change, add, or delete the terms of service at any time, and only reposting messages shall serve as proof of time.
book.rule_description.menu.rule_page.10: 11. You must maintain "good customs," "political neutrality," "no insults," and "no spreading of rumors" principles in public places and do the right things in the right places, but there are no restrictions in private settings (friends or private channels, direct messages with mutual consent). After being reminded or advised by anyone and failing to improve, the administrator has the right to penalize you.
book.rule_description.menu.rule_page.11: 12. The service adopts an open and liberal attitude unless it affects the normal operation of the service, in which case the reporting system (penalties are only imposed when reported by users) takes precedence.
book.rule_description.menu.rule_page.2: 3. The services should protect and keep confidential your "account data," "chat records," "world territories," and any data related to you (hereinafter referred to as "electromagnetic records"). However, if you haven't logged into the Minecraft server under the service for over 1 year, the administrator has the right to delete your electromagnetic records.
book.rule_description.menu.rule_page.3: 4. The service promises to be online 24 hours a day, except for certain force majeure circumstances, including but not limited to "undersea cable faults," "supplier issues," "large-scale power outages," and "regular maintenance." If your electromagnetic records are lost due to reasons other than those mentioned above, the administrator will compensate you as much as possible.
book.rule_description.menu.rule_page.4: 5. Any changes adopted within the scope of the service by the administrator are the sole responsibility of the administrator, and those who propose suggestions need not bear any subsequent responsibilities. Users who are dissatisfied with the administrator's changes may complain to a reasonable extent, and the administrator may not penalize complainants.
book.rule_description.menu.rule_page.5: 6. Commitments between users are not related to the administrator, and the administrator will not guarantee users unless the situation becomes so serious that it threatens the stability of the community, in which case relevant personnel may be penalized. If your rights are infringed for reasons other than those mentioned above, you must file a complaint within seven days of the incident, otherwise it will be considered dropped.
book.rule_description.menu.rule_page.6: 7. Each user is only allowed to use this service with one account. You are responsible for your account, and when your account violates the rules, it is considered a violation by you personally, and any requests for transfer of electromagnetic records will not be accepted. The occurrence and results of penalties are kept confidential (only relevant parties can see them), and penalized individuals can request public disclosure within the Discord group.
book.rule_description.menu.rule_page.7: 8. Significant changes should be notified several days in advance and all affected users should be informed, but special surprises and ad hoc error fixes are not included in this category. Minor changes should be notified two days in advance, and major changes should be notified seven days in advance.
book.rule_description.menu.rule_page.8: 9. Electromagnetic records cannot be "created," "read," "copied," "altered," or "deleted" by means not provided by the service (including but not limited to "cheating," "impersonation," "exploiting vulnerabilities"). The administrator has the right to freeze electromagnetic records that do not comply with regulations or originate from unauthorized sources, and may demand compensation from relevant parties.
book.rule_description.menu.rule_page.9: 10. You should comply with any "Republic of China laws," "Microsoft Terms of Service," "Minecraft Terms of Service," and "catbud.net Terms of Service," and respect every user and administrator. When you violate any of the above provisions, the administrator has the right to penalize you or take legal action against you, and may prohibit you from using the service by switching accounts as much as possible.
